## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo check --workspace`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo run --release --bin tsn -- ./examples/production-test.tsn`

## Risks

List behavior changes, compatibility risks, or migration notes.
